experiment: GATE 4 -- detection x FP ROC vs correlation window
finding: Without identity-scoping, benign FP rises with the window (75->93->176 over 15/60/300s) -- the precision/recall tradeoff. With service-account scoping, benign FP stays 0 across the same range, while the detection ceiling (max detectable attacker dwell) equals the window (fast 5s always caught; slow W+30 always missed). So identity-scoping DECOUPLES the window from precision: the window becomes a pure memory<->recall knob, and 60s is a design choice, not a cherry-picked sweet spot on a precision frontier.
